---
title: "Capstone3"
format: html
---

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
# Essential libraries
# install.packages("caret")
# install.packages("glmnet")
# install.packages("ranger")
# install.packages("randomForest")
# install.packages("xgboost")
# install.packages("iml")
# install.packages("slider")
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(arrow)
library(tidymodels)
library(yardstick)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(rsample)   # group_initial_split
library(caret)
library(recipes)
library(glmnet)
library(pROC)
library(ggplot2)
library(ranger)
library(iml)
library(knitr)
library(slider)
# install.packages("ipumsr")   # Install if needed
library(ipumsr)
library(fixest)

library(broom)
library(gt)

```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

stacked_state_month_clean <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "stacked_state_month_clean.rds"))
mw_panel <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "mw_panel.rds"))
dat_main0 <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "dat_main0.rds"))

```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

# 1) Get the new minimum wage at tau = 0 for each event using the treated state only
mw_new <- stacked_state_month_clean %>%
  filter(tau == 0) %>%
  distinct(event_id, treated_state, year, month) %>%   # Remove duplicates introduced by control states
  left_join(
    mw_panel %>% select(STATEFIP, year, month, mw_effective),
    by = c("treated_state" = "STATEFIP", "year", "month")
  ) %>%
  transmute(event_id, mw_new = mw_effective) %>%
  distinct(event_id, .keep_all = TRUE)                 # Extra safeguard: keep one row per event_id

# 2) Join pre-policy cell wages back to the individual-level data
cell_vars <- c("event_id", "STATEFIP", "SEX", "EDUC", "RACE", "HISPAN")

cell_pre <- dat_main0 %>%
  filter(tau >= -12, tau <= -1) %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(cell_vars))) %>%
  summarise(
    w_pre = weighted.mean(HOURWAGE, EARNWT_adj, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

dat_bound <- dat_main0 %>%
  left_join(cell_pre, by = cell_vars) %>%
  left_join(mw_new, by = "event_id") %>%
  mutate(
    ym = YEAR * 100 + MONTH,
    tau = as.integer(tau),
    bound_any = as.integer(!is.na(w_pre) & w_pre < mw_new),
    treat_bound = as.integer(treated == 1 & bound_any == 1)
  )

# Keep only cells that are observed in the pre-treatment period
pre_cells <- dat_bound %>%
  filter(tau <= -1, !is.na(w_pre)) %>%
  distinct(across(all_of(cell_vars))) %>%
  mutate(tag = 1)

dat_bound <- dat_bound %>%
  left_join(pre_cells, by = cell_vars) %>%
  filter(tag == 1)

```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
dat_bound %>%
  group_by(tau) %>%
  summarise(miss_wpre = mean(is.na(w_pre)), n = n(), .groups="drop") %>%
  arrange(tau)
```



```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

# 1) Within dat_bound, get the treated-state baseline and new minimum wage for each event
event_base_new <- dat_bound %>%
  filter(treated == 1, tau == 0) %>%  # tau == 0 corresponds to the implementation month
  distinct(event_id, mw_new, mw_base)

# 2) Compute the dollar increase for each event
event_base_new <- event_base_new %>%
  mutate(delta_event = mw_new - mw_base)

# 3) Join delta_event back to the stacked data and construct the counterfactual threshold
dat_bound2 <- dat_bound %>%
  left_join(event_base_new %>% select(event_id, delta_event), by = "event_id") %>%
  mutate(
    thr_cf = mw_base + delta_event,
    bound_cf = as.integer(
      !is.na(w_pre) & !is.na(mw_base) & !is.na(thr_cf) &
      w_pre >= mw_base & w_pre < thr_cf
    ),
    treat_bound_cf = as.integer(treated == 1 & bound_cf == 1)
  )

write_rds(dat_bound2, here("data", "processed", "dat_bound2.rds"))

# ===== Define a tolerance-band version of the bound indicator without dropping events =====
eps <- 0.25  # You can also set eps = 0.50 as a robustness check

dat_bound2b <- dat_bound2 %>%
  mutate(
    thr_cf = mw_base + delta_event,

    # Original bound definition
    bound_cf = as.integer(
      !is.na(w_pre) & !is.na(mw_base) & !is.na(thr_cf) &
      w_pre >= mw_base & w_pre < thr_cf
    ),

    # Tolerance-band version
    bound_eps = as.integer(
      !is.na(w_pre) & !is.na(mw_base) & !is.na(thr_cf) &
      w_pre >= (mw_base - eps) & w_pre < (thr_cf + eps)
    ),

    treat_bound_cf  = as.integer(treated == 1 & bound_cf == 1),
    treat_bound_eps = as.integer(treated == 1 & bound_eps == 1)
  )

write_rds(dat_bound2b, here("data", "processed", "dat_bound2b.rds"))

```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
# Sanity check: identify events where the baseline minimum wage exceeds the new minimum wage
dat_bound2 %>%
  mutate(flag = mw_base > mw_new) %>%
  group_by(event_id) %>%
  summarise(share_base_above_new = mean(flag))

event_flag <- dat_bound2 %>%
  group_by(event_id) %>%
  summarise(
    any_high_base = any(mw_base > mw_new),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

event_flag %>%
  count(any_high_base)
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

event_ok_eps <- dat_bound2b %>%
  filter(treated == 1) %>%
  group_by(event_id) %>%
  summarise(
    share_bound_cf  = weighted.mean(bound_cf  == 1, EARNWT_adj, na.rm=TRUE),
    share_bound_eps = weighted.mean(bound_eps == 1, EARNWT_adj, na.rm=TRUE),
    delta_event = first(delta_event),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary(event_ok_eps$share_bound_cf)
summary(event_ok_eps$share_bound_eps)

# Check which events had zero support before but not after adding the tolerance band
event_ok_eps %>%
  summarise(
    n_events = n(),
    n_zero_cf  = sum(share_bound_cf  == 0, na.rm=TRUE),
    n_zero_eps = sum(share_bound_eps == 0, na.rm=TRUE)
  )
  
```


```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat_main_eps <- dat_bound2b %>%
  mutate(
    tau  = as.integer(tau),
    ym   = as.integer(ym),
    cell = interaction(SEX, EDUC, drop = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(tau >= -6, tau <= 12)
write_rds(dat_main_eps, here("data","processed","dat_main_eps.rds"))

```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
dat_main_eps <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "dat_main_eps.rds"))

m_main_hours_eps <- feols(
  UHRSWORKORG ~ i(tau, bound_eps, ref=-1) + i(tau, treat_bound_eps, ref=-1) + AGE + I(AGE^2)
  | event_id^STATEFIP + event_id^ym + event_id^cell + UNION + OCC2010 + IND,
  data = dat_main_eps,
  weights = ~EARNWT_adj,
  cluster = ~STATEFIP + event_id,
  lean = TRUE
)

p_main <- iplot(
  m_main_hours_eps,
  i.select = 2,
  ref.line = 0,
  main = "Dynamic Effects of Minimum Wage Increases on Usual Weekly Hours",
  xlab = "Event time (months relative to minimum-wage increase)",
  ylab = "Effect on usual weekly hours (hours per week)"
)

# Save the figure
png(
  filename = here("tables", "fig_baseline_event_study.png"),
  width = 2200, height = 1500, res = 300
)

fixest::iplot(
  m_main_hours_eps,
  i.select = 2,
  ref.line = 0,
  main = "Dynamic Effects of Minimum Wage Increases on Usual Weekly Hours",
  xlab = "Event time (months relative to minimum-wage increase)",
  ylab = "Effect on usual weekly hours (hours per week)"
)

dev.off()
# Pre-trend test over the near leads
fixest::wald(m_main_hours_eps, keep="tau::-(6|5|4|3|2):treat_bound_eps") 

# Post short-run / medium-run Wald tests
fixest::wald(m_main_hours_eps, keep="tau::(1|2|3|4|5|6):treat_bound_eps")
fixest::wald(m_main_hours_eps, keep="tau::(7|8|9|10|11|12):treat_bound_eps")
fixest::wald(m_main_hours_eps, keep="tau::(7|8|9|10|11):treat_bound_eps")
```



```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat_main_eps <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "dat_main_eps.rds"))

# -----------------------------
# Common transformations
# -----------------------------
dat_main_eps <- dat_main_eps %>%
  mutate(
    tau  = as.integer(tau),
    ym   = as.integer(ym),
    cell = if ("cell" %in% names(.)) cell else interaction(SEX, EDUC, drop = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(tau >= -6, tau <= 12)

dat_bins <- dat_main_eps %>%
  filter(tau != 0) %>%
  mutate(
    post_short = as.integer(tau >= 1 & tau <= 6),
    post_mid   = as.integer(tau >= 7 & tau <= 11)
  )

# -----------------------------
# Formulas
# -----------------------------
fe_full <- "event_id^STATEFIP + event_id^ym + event_id^cell + UNION + OCC2010 + IND"

f_bins <- as.formula(paste0(
  "UHRSWORKORG ~ post_short:treat_bound_eps + post_mid:treat_bound_eps + ",
  "post_short:bound_eps + post_mid:bound_eps + AGE + I(AGE^2) | ", fe_full
))

f_tau <- as.formula(paste0(
  "UHRSWORKORG ~ i(tau, bound_eps, ref=-1) + i(tau, treat_bound_eps, ref=-1) + ",
  "AGE + I(AGE^2) | ", fe_full
))

# -----------------------------
# Helpers
# -----------------------------
get_wald_p <- function(w){
  if (!is.null(w$p.value)) return(as.numeric(w$p.value))
  if (!is.null(w$`p-value`)) return(as.numeric(w$`p-value`))
  if (!is.null(w$p)) return(as.numeric(w$p))
  NA_real_
}

extract_bins <- function(m){
  td <- broom::tidy(m)

  # Allow for possible variation in the ordering of term names returned by fixest
  wanted <- tibble(
    Term = c(
      "Post (1-6) × Treated × Bound",
      "Post (7-11) × Treated × Bound"
    ),
    term_pattern = c(
      "^post_short:treat_bound_eps$|^treat_bound_eps:post_short$",
      "^post_mid:treat_bound_eps$|^treat_bound_eps:post_mid$"
    )
  )

  out <- wanted %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      estimate = td$estimate[grepl(term_pattern, td$term)][1],
      std.error = td$std.error[grepl(term_pattern, td$term)][1],
      p.value = td$p.value[grepl(term_pattern, td$term)][1]
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      stars = case_when(
        is.na(p.value) ~ "",
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.10 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      coef_se = ifelse(
        is.na(estimate),
        NA_character_,
        sprintf("%.3f%s\n(%.3f)", estimate, stars, std.error)
      )
    ) %>%
    select(Term, coef_se)

  out
}

run_one_cluster <- function(cluster_fml, colname, cluster_label){
  m_bins <- feols(
    f_bins,
    data = dat_bins,
    weights = ~EARNWT_adj,
    cluster = cluster_fml,
    lean = TRUE
  )

  m_tau <- feols(
    f_tau,
    data = dat_main_eps,
    weights = ~EARNWT_adj,
    cluster = cluster_fml,
    lean = TRUE
  )

  p_pre <- get_wald_p(
    fixest::wald(m_tau, keep = "tau::-(6|5|4|3|2):treat_bound_eps")
  )

  tab <- extract_bins(m_bins) %>%
    rename(!!colname := coef_se)

  list(
    tab = tab,
    p_pre = p_pre,
    nobs = broom::glance(m_bins)$nobs,
    cluster_label = cluster_label
  )
}

# -----------------------------
# Run specifications
# -----------------------------
spec_tw <- run_one_cluster(~STATEFIP + event_id, "Baseline (State & Event)", "Two-way: state & event")
spec_s  <- run_one_cluster(~STATEFIP,            "State only",               "One-way: state")
spec_e  <- run_one_cluster(~event_id,            "Event only",               "One-way: event")

# -----------------------------
# Build combined main-results table
# -----------------------------
table41_combined <- spec_tw$tab %>%
  left_join(spec_s$tab, by = "Term") %>%
  left_join(spec_e$tab, by = "Term") %>%
  bind_rows(
    tibble(
      Term = "Pre-trend Wald p-value (τ = -6 to -2)",
      `Baseline (State & Event)` = sprintf("%.3f", spec_tw$p_pre),
      `State only`               = sprintf("%.3f", spec_s$p_pre),
      `Event only`               = sprintf("%.3f", spec_e$p_pre)
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Observations",
      `Baseline (State & Event)` = format(spec_tw$nobs, big.mark = ","),
      `State only`               = format(spec_s$nobs, big.mark = ","),
      `Event only`               = format(spec_e$nobs, big.mark = ",")
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Event × State FE",
      `Baseline (State & Event)` = "Yes",
      `State only`               = "Yes",
      `Event only`               = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Event × Month FE",
      `Baseline (State & Event)` = "Yes",
      `State only`               = "Yes",
      `Event only`               = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Event × Cell FE",
      `Baseline (State & Event)` = "Yes",
      `State only`               = "Yes",
      `Event only`               = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Industry / Occupation / Union FE",
      `Baseline (State & Event)` = "Yes",
      `State only`               = "Yes",
      `Event only`               = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Clustering",
      `Baseline (State & Event)` = spec_tw$cluster_label,
      `State only`               = spec_s$cluster_label,
      `Event only`               = spec_e$cluster_label
    )
  )

gt_table41 <- table41_combined %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Table 4.1 Baseline Bin Estimates and Alternative Clustering Structures") %>%
  cols_label(
    Term = "",
    `Baseline (State & Event)` = "Baseline (State & Event)",
    `State only` = "State only",
    `Event only` = "Event only"
  ) %>%
  cols_width(
    Term ~ px(400),
    `Baseline (State & Event)` ~ px(150),
    `State only` ~ px(150),
    `Event only` ~ px(150)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(whitespace = "pre-line"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(whitespace = "pre-line"),
    locations = cells_source_notes()
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = "small",
    data_row.padding = px(3),
    source_notes.font.size = "small"
  )

gtsave(
  gt_table41,
  filename = here("tables", "table41_combined_clustering.png"),
  vwidth = 1400,
  vheight = 1000
)

```


```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
dat_bound2b <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "dat_bound2b.rds"))

# ===== 0) Prepare the data using the same sample definition as in the baseline specification =====
df <- dat_bound2b %>%
  mutate(
    tau  = as.integer(tau),
    ym   = as.integer(ym),
    cell = interaction(SEX, EDUC, drop = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(tau >= -6, tau <= 12) %>%
  filter(tau != 0) %>%                 # Drop tau = 0 to match the bin specification
  filter(!is.na(delta_event))

# ===== 1) Create event-level terciles based on the size of the minimum-wage increase =====
ev_grp <- df %>%
  distinct(event_id, delta_event)

q33 <- quantile(ev_grp$delta_event, 1/3, na.rm = TRUE)
q66 <- quantile(ev_grp$delta_event, 2/3, na.rm = TRUE)

ev_grp <- ev_grp %>%
  mutate(
    shock_grp = case_when(
      delta_event <= q33 ~ "small",
      delta_event <= q66 ~ "medium",
      TRUE               ~ "large"
    )
  )

df <- df %>%
  left_join(ev_grp, by = c("event_id", "delta_event"))

# ===== 2) Define post-treatment bins to match the baseline bin specification =====
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    post_short = as.integer(tau >= 1 & tau <= 6),
    post_mid   = as.integer(tau >= 7 & tau <= 11)
  )

# ===== 3) Run subgroup regressions and compute pre-trend tests =====
fit_bins_and_pre <- function(d){
  m_bins <- feols(
    UHRSWORKORG ~
      post_short:treat_bound_eps + post_mid:treat_bound_eps +
      post_short:bound_eps + post_mid:bound_eps +
      AGE + I(AGE^2)
    | event_id^STATEFIP + event_id^ym + event_id^cell + UNION + OCC2010 + IND,
    data = d,
    weights = ~EARNWT_adj,
    cluster = ~STATEFIP + event_id,
    lean = TRUE
  )

  m_pre <- feols(
    UHRSWORKORG ~ i(tau, bound_eps, ref = -1) + i(tau, treat_bound_eps, ref = -1) + AGE + I(AGE^2)
    | event_id^STATEFIP + event_id^ym + event_id^cell + UNION + OCC2010 + IND,
    data = d,
    weights = ~EARNWT_adj,
    cluster = ~STATEFIP + event_id,
    lean = TRUE
  )

  # Two alternative pre-trend windows
  w_pre_6_2 <- fixest::wald(m_pre, keep = "tau::-(6|5|4|3|2):treat_bound_eps")
  w_pre_4_2 <- fixest::wald(m_pre, keep = "tau::-(4|3|2):treat_bound_eps")

  list(
    m_bins = m_bins,
    m_pre = m_pre,
    w_pre_6_2 = w_pre_6_2,
    w_pre_4_2 = w_pre_4_2
  )
}

res_small  <- fit_bins_and_pre(df %>% filter(shock_grp == "small"))
res_medium <- fit_bins_and_pre(df %>% filter(shock_grp == "medium"))
res_large  <- fit_bins_and_pre(df %>% filter(shock_grp == "large"))


```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
ev_grp %>%
  group_by(shock_grp) %>%
  summarise(n_events = n())

df %>%
  group_by(shock_grp) %>%
  summarise(n_obs = n())

df %>%
  group_by(shock_grp, event_id) %>%
  summarise(n_obs_event = n()) %>%
  group_by(shock_grp) %>%
  summarise(avg_obs_per_event = mean(n_obs_event))
```


```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
# Extract and format the two key coefficients from one model
extract_two_terms <- function(m){
  broom::tidy(m) %>%
    filter(term %in% c("post_short:treat_bound_eps", "treat_bound_eps:post_mid")) %>%
    mutate(
      Term = case_when(
        term == "post_short:treat_bound_eps" ~ "Post (1-6) × Treated × Bound",
        term == "treat_bound_eps:post_mid"   ~ "Post (7-11) × Treated × Bound"
      ),
      stars = case_when(
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.10 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      coef_se = sprintf("%.3f%s\n(%.3f)", estimate, stars, std.error)
    ) %>%
    select(Term, coef_se)
}

t_small  <- extract_two_terms(res_small$m_bins)  %>% rename(Small = coef_se)
t_medium <- extract_two_terms(res_medium$m_bins) %>% rename(Medium = coef_se)
t_large  <- extract_two_terms(res_large$m_bins)  %>% rename(Large = coef_se)

# ===== Event counts by tercile =====
n_events_tbl <- ev_grp %>%
  count(shock_grp, name = "n_events")

n_events_small  <- n_events_tbl %>% filter(shock_grp == "small")  %>% pull(n_events)
n_events_medium <- n_events_tbl %>% filter(shock_grp == "medium") %>% pull(n_events)
n_events_large  <- n_events_tbl %>% filter(shock_grp == "large")  %>% pull(n_events)

tab3 <- t_small %>%
  left_join(t_medium, by = "Term") %>%
  left_join(t_large,  by = "Term")

g_small  <- broom::glance(res_small$m_bins)
g_medium <- broom::glance(res_medium$m_bins)
g_large  <- broom::glance(res_large$m_bins)

# Pre-trend p-values: the returned field name can vary across Wald objects
get_p <- function(w){
  if (!is.null(w$p.value)) return(as.numeric(w$p.value))
  if (!is.null(w$`p-value`)) return(as.numeric(w$`p-value`))
  if (!is.null(w$p)) return(as.numeric(w$p))
  NA_real_
}

p_small_6_2  <- get_p(res_small$w_pre_6_2)
p_medium_6_2 <- get_p(res_medium$w_pre_6_2)
p_large_6_2  <- get_p(res_large$w_pre_6_2)

p_small_4_2  <- get_p(res_small$w_pre_4_2)
p_medium_4_2 <- get_p(res_medium$w_pre_4_2)
p_large_4_2  <- get_p(res_large$w_pre_4_2)

tab3 <- tab3 %>%
  bind_rows(
    tibble(
      Term   = "Pre-trend Wald p-value (τ = -6 to -2)",
      Small  = sprintf("%.3f", p_small_6_2),
      Medium = sprintf("%.3f", p_medium_6_2),
      Large  = sprintf("%.3f", p_large_6_2)
    ),
    tibble(
      Term   = "Pre-trend Wald p-value (τ = -4 to -2)",
      Small  = sprintf("%.3f", p_small_4_2),
      Medium = sprintf("%.3f", p_medium_4_2),
      Large  = sprintf("%.3f", p_large_4_2)
    ),
    tibble(
      Term   = "Events",
      Small  = format(n_events_small, big.mark = ","),
      Medium = format(n_events_medium, big.mark = ","),
      Large  = format(n_events_large, big.mark = ",")
    ),
    tibble(
      Term   = "Observations",
      Small  = format(g_small$nobs, big.mark = ","),
      Medium = format(g_medium$nobs, big.mark = ","),
      Large  = format(g_large$nobs, big.mark = ",")
    ),
    tibble(
      Term   = "R-squared",
      Small  = sprintf("%.3f", g_small$r.squared),
      Medium = sprintf("%.3f", g_medium$r.squared),
      Large  = sprintf("%.3f", g_large$r.squared)
    ),
    tibble(Term = "Event × State FE", Small = "Yes", Medium = "Yes", Large = "Yes"),
    tibble(Term = "Event × Month FE", Small = "Yes", Medium = "Yes", Large = "Yes"),
    tibble(Term = "Event × Cell FE", Small = "Yes", Medium = "Yes", Large = "Yes"),
    tibble(Term = "Industry / Occupation / Union FE", Small = "Yes", Medium = "Yes", Large = "Yes"),
    tibble(Term = "Clustered SE", Small = "State & Event", Medium = "State & Event", Large = "State & Event")
  )

gt_tab3 <- tab3 %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Table 4.3 Heterogeneity by Policy Intensity (Terciles)") %>%
  cols_label(Term = "", Small = "Small", Medium = "Medium", Large = "Large") %>%
  cols_width(
    Term ~ px(400),
    `Small` ~ px(150),
    `Medium` ~ px(150),
    `Large` ~ px(150)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(whitespace = "pre-line"),
    locations = cells_source_notes()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(whitespace = "pre-line"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = c(Small, Medium, Large))
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = "small",
    data_row.padding = px(3),
    source_notes.font.size = "small"
  )

gtsave(gt_tab3, here("tables", "table3_shock_terciles.html"))
saveRDS(gt_tab3, here("tables", "table3_shock_terciles.rds"))
gtsave(
  gt_tab3,
  filename = here::here("tables", "table3_shock_terciles.png"),
  vwidth = 1400,
  vheight = 950
)

```


```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

m_dose <- feols(
  UHRSWORKORG ~ 
    post_short:treat_bound_eps + post_mid:treat_bound_eps +
    post_short:treat_bound_eps:delta_event + post_mid:treat_bound_eps:delta_event +
    post_short:bound_eps + post_mid:bound_eps +
    AGE + I(AGE^2)
  | event_id^STATEFIP + event_id^ym + event_id^cell + UNION + OCC2010 + IND,
  data = df,
  weights = ~EARNWT_adj,
  cluster = ~STATEFIP + event_id,
  lean = TRUE
)

summary(m_dose)

```
```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
m_bins <- feols(
  UHRSWORKORG ~ 
    post_short:treat_bound_eps + post_mid:treat_bound_eps +
    post_short:bound_eps + post_mid:bound_eps +
    AGE + I(AGE^2)
  | event_id^STATEFIP + event_id^ym + event_id^cell + UNION + OCC2010 + IND,
  data = df,
  weights = ~EARNWT_adj,
  cluster = ~STATEFIP + event_id,
  lean = TRUE
)
# -----------------------------
# Helper: add stars and format coefficients
# -----------------------------
fmt_coef_se <- function(estimate, std.error, p.value){
  stars <- dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p.value) ~ "",
    p.value < 0.01 ~ "***",
    p.value < 0.05 ~ "**",
    p.value < 0.10 ~ "*",
    TRUE ~ ""
  )
  sprintf("%.3f%s\n(%.3f)", estimate, stars, std.error)
}

# -----------------------------
# Extract baseline terms
# -----------------------------
tidy_base <- broom::tidy(m_bins)

base_terms <- tibble(
  Term = c(
    "Post (1-6) × Treated × Bound",
    "Post (7-11) × Treated × Bound"
  ),
  term_pattern = c(
    "^post_short:treat_bound_eps$|^treat_bound_eps:post_short$",
    "^post_mid:treat_bound_eps$|^treat_bound_eps:post_mid$"
  )
) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    estimate  = tidy_base$estimate[grepl(term_pattern, tidy_base$term)][1],
    std.error = tidy_base$std.error[grepl(term_pattern, tidy_base$term)][1],
    p.value   = tidy_base$p.value[grepl(term_pattern, tidy_base$term)][1],
    Baseline  = fmt_coef_se(estimate, std.error, p.value)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Term, Baseline)

# -----------------------------
# Extract dose-response terms
# -----------------------------
tidy_dose <- broom::tidy(m_dose)

dose_terms <- tibble(
  Term = c(
    "Post (1-6) × Treated × Bound",
    "Post (7-11) × Treated × Bound",
    "Post (1-6) × Treated × Bound × ΔMW",
    "Post (7-11) × Treated × Bound × ΔMW"
  ),
  term_pattern = c(
    "^post_short:treat_bound_eps$|^treat_bound_eps:post_short$",
    "^post_mid:treat_bound_eps$|^treat_bound_eps:post_mid$",
    "^post_short:treat_bound_eps:delta_event$|^post_short:delta_event:treat_bound_eps$|^treat_bound_eps:post_short:delta_event$|^treat_bound_eps:delta_event:post_short$|^delta_event:post_short:treat_bound_eps$|^delta_event:treat_bound_eps:post_short$",
    "^post_mid:treat_bound_eps:delta_event$|^post_mid:delta_event:treat_bound_eps$|^treat_bound_eps:post_mid:delta_event$|^treat_bound_eps:delta_event:post_mid$|^delta_event:post_mid:treat_bound_eps$|^delta_event:treat_bound_eps:post_mid$"
  )
) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    estimate  = tidy_dose$estimate[grepl(term_pattern, tidy_dose$term)][1],
    std.error = tidy_dose$std.error[grepl(term_pattern, tidy_dose$term)][1],
    p.value   = tidy_dose$p.value[grepl(term_pattern, tidy_dose$term)][1],
    `Dose–Response` = ifelse(
      is.na(estimate),
      "",
      fmt_coef_se(estimate, std.error, p.value)
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Term, `Dose–Response`)

# -----------------------------
# Merge the two columns
# -----------------------------
table2 <- tibble(
  Term = c(
    "Post (1-6) × Treated × Bound",
    "Post (7-11) × Treated × Bound",
    "Post (1-6) × Treated × Bound × ΔMW",
    "Post (7-11) × Treated × Bound × ΔMW"
  )
) %>%
  left_join(base_terms, by = "Term") %>%
  left_join(dose_terms, by = "Term") %>%
  mutate(
    Baseline = ifelse(is.na(Baseline), "-", Baseline)
  )

# -----------------------------
# Add summary rows
# -----------------------------
ms_base <- broom::glance(m_bins)
ms_dose <- broom::glance(m_dose)

table2 <- table2 %>%
  bind_rows(
    tibble(
      Term = "Observations",
      Baseline = format(ms_base$nobs, big.mark = ","),
      `Dose–Response` = format(ms_dose$nobs, big.mark = ",")
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "R-squared",
      Baseline = sprintf("%.3f", ms_base$r.squared),
      `Dose–Response` = sprintf("%.3f", ms_dose$r.squared)
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Event × State FE",
      Baseline = "Yes",
      `Dose–Response` = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Event × Month FE",
      Baseline = "Yes",
      `Dose–Response` = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Event × Cell FE",
      Baseline = "Yes",
      `Dose–Response` = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Industry / Occupation / Union FE",
      Baseline = "Yes",
      `Dose–Response` = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Clustered SE",
      Baseline = "State & Event",
      `Dose–Response` = "State & Event"
    )
  )

# -----------------------------
# GT table
# -----------------------------
gt_table2 <- table2 %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Table 4.2 Dose–Response Test: Interaction with Minimum Wage Increase") %>%
  cols_label(
    Term = "",
    Baseline = "Baseline",
    `Dose–Response` = "Dose–Response"
  ) %>%
  cols_width(
    Term ~ px(400),
    `Baseline` ~ px(225),
    `Dose–Response` ~ px(225)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(whitespace = "pre-line"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = c(Baseline, `Dose–Response`))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(whitespace = "pre-line"),
    locations = cells_source_notes()
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = "small",
    data_row.padding = px(3),
    source_notes.font.size = "small"
  )

gtsave(
  gt_table2,
  filename = here("tables", "table2_dose_response_two_cols.png"),
  vwidth = 1400,
  vheight = 1000
)

```
